description: Table of some sort. There are headers referring to properties or landmarks: al-ṭāḥūn (the mill)... Darb al-Kharrāṭīn... ḥānūt (a shop).... ḥānūt.... Underneath each header there are numbers and possibly names. There are large blank spaces in between the entries.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
